We are going to fight every one of these attempts by Trump and Republicans to undermine our elections and ensure that we once again have free and fair elections.

Trump just fired the remaining members of the Election Assistance Commission, an independent agency that helps run secure elections.

This move, as well as trying to force through the SAVE America Act, is a full-on assault on our elections just months before November. 🧵

An independent investigation is needed now. 

The @HispanicCaucus is united and won't stay silent. Lorenzo's family - and all Americans - deserve answers.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Robert Menendez. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-30T23:52:53Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
